product.name: ArDura 500 CG
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny PA 6.6 — warianty powlekane, FR i wzmocnione
product.familyDescriptorEn: PA 6.6 fabrics — coated, FR and reinforced variants
product.categorySourceGroup: Cut-proof knit fabric from p-aramid. Bomb and nail proof woven fabrics from Pa6.6
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven fabric for Bomb Disposal Suits
product.specLine: 350 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Herringbone Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 500 CG is 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for bomb disposal suits, military, police and gendarme wear and nail proof pockets on workwear.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for bomb disposal clothing.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
Pa6.6 woven fabric for Bomb Disposal Suits
350 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Herringbone Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>3500N; Weft>2500N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>250N; Weft>220N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1
